claim_error_rules.message: Claim has non-related op with main op code
claim_error_rules.meaning: The submitted labor operations do not appear to relate correctly to the main labor operation or the claim structure.
validation_checks: Confirm the primary op code is correct
Remove non-related operations
Check labor op hierarchy
recommended_fix_steps: Keep only operations supported by the repair story

claim_error_rules.message: *TT opcode not allowed as main OP
claim_error_rules.meaning: A TT operation was entered as the main operation when Hyundai does not allow that usage.
validation_checks: Check whether TT code should be secondary only
recommended_fix_steps: Replace the main op with the correct primary operation
Move TT op to supported position only if allowed

claim_error_rules.message: Op Code not applicable to Causal Part
claim_error_rules.meaning: The labor operation entered does not match the causal part entered on the claim.
validation_checks: Confirm causal part number
Compare op family to part family
Review parts invoice or RO lines

claim_error_rules.meaning: The operation code entered is not accepted by WebDCS in the current claim context.
validation_checks: Re-check the bulletin or labor guide
Confirm claim type
recommended_fix_steps: Remove invalid line if not needed

claim_error_rules.meaning: The causal part number entered is not accepted as a valid causal part for the claim.
validation_checks: Compare causal part to replacement part
Check parts catalog or invoice
Validate part family against op code
recommended_fix_steps: Use the valid part family tied to the repair

claim_error_rules.meaning: Hyundai returned the claim and expects the dealer to review and correct it before resubmission.
validation_checks: Read return code and message
Review remark history
Confirm whether dealer reply is required
recommended_fix_steps: Resubmit only after the error is addressed

claim_error_rules.meaning: The rental claim was submitted without a matching repair claim or the related claim could not be found.
validation_checks: Confirm related warranty or campaign claim exists
Confirm RO linkage
recommended_fix_steps: Enter the correct related claim or RO
Wait until the repair claim exists if needed

claim_error_rules.message: Claim in hold status pending corresponding repair claim match
claim_error_rules.meaning: The system placed the claim on hold because it could not match the corresponding repair claim information.
validation_checks: Confirm RO number and claim details
Confirm matching repair claim exists
recommended_fix_steps: Resubmit or wait for claim match

claim_error_rules.meaning: The claim is missing a required attachment category or the existing file was not categorized correctly.
validation_checks: Confirm required categories exist
Confirm category selection is correct
recommended_fix_steps: Resubmit only after required files are categorized

claim_error_rules.meaning: The audit could not find a usable VIN in the pasted materials.
validation_checks: Confirm claim screen or VIS text includes the VIN
recommended_fix_steps: Paste a cleaner claim screen or VIS section
Run the audit again once VIN is visible

claim_error_rules.meaning: The causal part does not align with the replacement part family or op code family.
validation_checks: Compare first five digits of causal and replacement part
Compare op family if supported
recommended_fix_steps: Verify the replacement part and op code

claim_error_rules.message: Claim mileage differs from latest STUI mileage
claim_error_rules.meaning: The final claim mileage does not match the latest STUI mileage for the VIN.
validation_checks: Compare claim mileage out to latest STUI event
recommended_fix_steps: Confirm which STUI event belongs to the claim

claim_error_rules.meaning: Attachments appear to come from more than one date and may need explanation.
validation_checks: Review STUI dates
Compare to repair timeline
recommended_fix_steps: Confirm whether this is one story across multiple dates

claim_error_rules.message: Campaign history found in VIS or RO history
claim_error_rules.meaning: Campaign or recall work appears in history and should be separated from the current warranty issue if unrelated.
validation_checks: Compare current RO and claim type to prior campaign records
recommended_fix_steps: Keep the claim built on the correct RO
